meta.title: DAR Hypotheken — Sustainable. Alternative. Interest-Free.
meta.description: The first halal mortgage in the Netherlands. DAR aims to enrich the existing housing market with an alternative, modern financial product that is interest-free.

about.heading: Discover how we work together towards a future where everyone belongs
about.description1: DAR is transforming the financial sector with the first inclusive mortgage platform in the Netherlands.
about.description2: Our innovative solutions make access to the housing market more accessible for a wider audience.
about.videoFallback: Your browser does not support video.

pillars.purposeDescription: DAR aims to enrich the existing housing market with an alternative, modern financial product that is interest-free.
pillars.inclusiviteitText: We make homeownership accessible for everyone.
pillars.duurzaamText: Contributing to a better future with sustainable financial solutions.
pillars.medeEigendomText: With us, you buy the property together, and in installments you buy out our share.
pillars.vasteBetalingenText: Enjoy financial stability without unexpected interest rate changes; you always pay the same amount.
pillars.geenRenteText: Instead of paying interest for borrowing, you pay a fee for the use of the property.

timeline.heading: Mortgage Process
timeline.step1Description: The fixed monthly payment consists of (i) repayment and (ii) usage fee.
timeline.step2Description: The repayment schedule (30 years) is based on DAR's share in the purchase price.
timeline.step3Description: The price/fee is based on market conditions.
timeline.step4Description: At the end of the term, the consumer takes over the co-ownership share.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.subtitle: Ready to discover more?
contact.description1: Fill in the form and receive more information
contact.description2: about the possibilities of a DAR mortgage.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Read the latest insights on mortgages, sustainability and the housing market.

privacy.title: Privacy Statement
privacy.s1heading: Why do we process personal data?
privacy.s1intro: In order to make you a mortgage offer once DAR Hypotheken B.V. is live, we, DAR Hypotheken B.V. (hereinafter: DAR, we or us), assess your situation. We process your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). We use your data for:
privacy.s1item1: preparing, entering into and executing an agreement with DAR
privacy.s1item2: informing you about relevant products and services from DAR
privacy.s1item4: recording data and communicating with competent authorities
privacy.s1item5: preventing and combating money laundering and other forms of financial crime
privacy.s1item6: conducting statistical analyses to find/investigate trends, problems, causes of errors and risks
privacy.s1item7: assessing your and our risks (including those of our investors)
privacy.s1item9: developing and improving our products and services
privacy.s1item10: entering into and executing business transactions of DAR
privacy.s1item11: providing services to DAR's investors (from whom DAR receives the funds to provide you with the mortgage)
privacy.s2heading: On what grounds do we process your personal data?
privacy.s2intro: We process personal data when we have a lawful reason (legal basis) to do so:
privacy.s2item1: the processing is necessary for the performance of the agreement with you;
privacy.s2item2: the processing is necessary to comply with a legal obligation imposed on DAR;
privacy.s2item3: the processing is necessary for the pursuit of a legitimate interest of DAR or a third party, except where your privacy rights prevail. For example, we have a legitimate interest in informing customers about our products and services, improving them, conducting market research and (statistical) analyses, or entering into business transactions in the interest of DAR, its group companies or investors;
privacy.s2item4: the processing takes place with your consent. You may of course withdraw your consent at any time. Withdrawal of consent does not affect the lawfulness of processing that took place before the withdrawal.
privacy.s3heading: What personal data do we process about you?
privacy.s3item1: your name, place of residence and other contact details;
privacy.s3item2: your gender, nationality, profession, age, marital status and other relevant customer data;
privacy.s3item3: details of the collateral for your mortgage;
privacy.s3item4: details of your current mortgage, other loans and obligations;
privacy.s3item5: details of the credit agreement you enter into with us;
privacy.s3item7: your identification data such as your citizen service number;
privacy.s3item9: personal data from correspondence with you; and
privacy.s3item10: criminal data, insofar as required or permitted by law and regulations.
privacy.s3outro: We usually receive personal data directly from you. Sometimes we receive it from other sources, such as your partner, intermediaries, calculation experts, the Valuation of Immovable Property (WOZ) register and parties mentioned later in this privacy statement under "Exchange of Personal Data".
privacy.s4intro: We record when and what you contact us about. We also retain the emails you send to us. Furthermore, we may record conversations you have with us, such as via telephone or (video) chat. We use these recordings, emails and chat conversations:
privacy.s4item1: for quality purposes such as improving our services, training, coaching and evaluating our employees;
privacy.s4item2: as evidence in complaints or legal proceedings;
privacy.s5text: We track how you use our websites: www.darhypotheken.nl. This information helps us improve and make our (online) services more user-friendly. We may also use this data as evidence, for example when handling questions or complaints.
privacy.s6text: We naturally respect your privacy and treat the personal data you provide to us confidentially. Our employees are also required to keep your data confidential. This confidentiality does not apply if the law requires or permits otherwise.
privacy.s7text: We take appropriate measures to prevent misuse, loss, unauthorized access and other undesirable actions with your personal data.
privacy.s8text: The mortgage application process is carried out on our behalf by service partners with whom we share personal data. To process your application, we request data from various agencies, such as the Bureau Krediet Registratie (BKR), the Employee Insurance Agency (UWV), the Chamber of Commerce (KvK) and the Land Registry, so that we can verify the information you have provided. Once you accept a mortgage offer from us, we send your data to the notary you have specified for the execution of the mortgage. After we have taken your mortgage into management, we may, if there is reason to do so, share data again with your intermediary. If you no longer wish this or want to switch to another intermediary, you can let us know. We share your data with our service partners and their subsidiaries, who support us in the administration of your mortgage and the processing of your credit and personal data. In case of fraud, we may pass your data to the Stichting Fraudepreventie Hypotheken (SFH) and other financial institutions, insofar as permitted, to safeguard the safety and integrity of the financial sector. We only provide personal data to third parties when this is necessary for the execution of an agreement with you, to comply with legal obligations, or when permitted by law and regulations.
privacy.s9heading: Where is your personal data processed?
privacy.s9text: The processing of personal data that you provide to DAR usually takes place within the European Economic Area (EEA). If we do share personal data with parties outside the EEA, we only do so if the GDPR requirements are met. In such cases, we use, for example, Standard Contractual Clauses (European model contract provisions).
privacy.s10intro: We do not retain or process your personal data longer than necessary or legally required. Because we process your personal data for entering into or executing a credit agreement, the following periods apply:
privacy.s10item1: If you have entered into a credit agreement with us, we may process your personal data up to seven years after repayment of the credit or after the last action in the context of the credit agreement.
privacy.s10item2: If we have made an offer but have not entered into a credit agreement with you, we may process your personal data up to two years after the expiry of the validity of our mortgage offer.
privacy.s10item3: If you have submitted an application but we have not made an offer, we may process your data up to two years after the expiry of the date of your mortgage application.
privacy.s11heading: Requests regarding the processing of your personal data
privacy.s11text: You can ask us to view the personal data we process. You can ask us to modify, delete or transfer the personal data you have provided to us in digital form. In addition, you can ask us to restrict the processing of your personal data and you can object to certain processing of your personal data. If we process your personal data based on your consent, you can withdraw this consent at any time. For such requests, you can contact us in writing using the contact details in this privacy statement. According to the law, various exceptions to the aforementioned rights apply. We will check on a case-by-case basis whether these apply.
privacy.s12text: We are happy to help if you have complaints about the processing of your personal data. You can send these to the above postal address or email directly to: info@darhypotheken.nl. If you are unable to resolve the matter with us, you have the right under privacy legislation to file a complaint with the privacy regulator: the Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens.
privacy.s13text: We reserve the right to amend this privacy statement in the future. We always publish the most recent version on our website www.darhypotheken.nl. We recommend that you consult this statement regularly.

chat.title: DAR Assistant
chat.welcome: Welcome! Please fill in your details to get started.
chat.leadFormIntro: Fill in your details so we can assist you better. Your information is treated confidentially.
chat.greeting: Hello! How can I help you with information about DAR Hypotheken?
chat.comingSoon: Our chat assistant will be available soon. We have received your details and will contact you. You can also email info@darhypotheken.nl.
chat.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
chat.rateLimited: You are sending too many messages. Please wait and try again.

apply.introText: DAR intends to introduce a halal mortgage on the Dutch market. To gauge interest in this product and get an initial indication of whether it may be suitable for you, DAR asks you to fill in some personal and financial details below.
apply.introText2: This data will be used exclusively to (i) determine your interest in the DAR mortgage and (ii) assess whether your situation broadly fits the expected product conditions.
apply.introText3: Additionally, we will use your contact details to inform you by email once DAR officially launches, provided you give consent.
apply.purchaseType: Do you want to buy alone or together?
apply.income: What is your (combined) gross annual income?
apply.financingPercentage: What percentage of the property value do you wish to finance?
apply.currentMortgage: Do you currently have a mortgage?
apply.currentMortgageHelp: This question helps us determine the general demand for refinancing vs. new purchase mortgages.
apply.dataConsent: I am aware that DAR uses my personal data to determine the demand for the DAR mortgage and to make an initial assessment of whether my situation fits within the expected product conditions.
apply.emailConsent: I agree that DAR may contact me by email to inform me once the product is available.
apply.privacyNote: For more information about the processing of your personal data, please refer to our
apply.successMessage: We have received your details. Once DAR Hypotheken officially launches, we will inform you by email.
